We recently had them renovate our kitchen at home, as well as build an addition to our deck and were more than happy with price and delivery on that.     We went with Coastaltek again to do repairs after an insurance claim at my parents house and they once again came through for us.

You can trust these guys to get the job done and give you good honest quotes on everything they do.    Can't recommend them enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"rodrigo curvo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLApY3Y3lQzpDr4dPtzr-38LEpNzwLxxqbVJLvlveutA_n0Fg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Coastal Tek is an extremely professional and experienced company in Prince Rupert. I had a flood on my lower level last year, so Chris and his team acted right away, providing a high quality service. I highly recommend to everyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blair Mirau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxer6JLW3eJVvck6KrpMOrqyQ9r4NaMAi8sN_TkCHD_JBWwWbT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"TL;DR: these guys are great!

After a home water line break late just before dinnertime, these guys were on site within 30 minutes of my phone call. They had industrial air blowers setup and the flooded carpet pulled up that evening. Within a couple of days, they had all the damaged drywall and fixtures out.

Beyond how fast they worked, it was the little details that matter like putting plastic down in the hallway to avoid tracking in dirt, and building temporary plastic doorways to contain dust.

Lucky for me that my next door neighbours recommended these guys, so now I get to return the favour to anyone reading this. Don't hesitate to call Chris & Leon.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sydney Be","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-FFB-uJB0cl0IBQ3XNHNBtEkPkfy8-ZV0NuLVZzK0E-YSIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have only great things to say about coastaltek. Leon and Chris were professional, knowledgeable and so helpful. They were thorough in their work, efficient and transparent in both their costs and what was needed for the job. We will always call them first.","Images":null,"When":""}]
